flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Albright College rose 19% between 2006 and 2009 ($26.6k → $31.6k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 18 pp at Albright College vs the 2003–2007 baseline (42.1% vs 60.0%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Albright College fell 11% between 2021 and 2024 (1.4k → 1.2k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Albright College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.7% → 0.0%).
